publishedAbstract: When installing Red Hat OpenShift Data Foundation Managed Service with Red Hat Hybrid Cloud Console (OCM web console) or via rosa cli on ROSA 4.10.x, the following event messages are shown:- Storage System ocs-storagecluster-storagesystem in openshift-storage project Condition: Progressing![](https://access.redhat.com/sites/default/files/attachments/odf-storage-system-progressing.png)- Checking events and found "InstallPlan not found for CSV mcg-operator.v4.10.9"![](https://access.redhat.com/sites/default/files/attachments/mcg_operator_install_plan.png)
publishedTitle: OpenShift Data Foundation managed service StorageSystems instance ocs-storagecluster-storagesystem Condition:Progressing with event "InstallPlan not found for CSV mcg-operator.v4.10.9"
